serverInfo.name: qr-design-studio
serverInfo.title: QR Design Studio
serverInfo.description: QR Design Studio exposes public HTTPS discovery metadata and optional read-only browser tools. It does not expose an executable remote MCP transport.

transport.note: This card documents public HTTPS resources and WebMCP-style browser tools only.

authentication.note: Public discovery is unauthenticated. This build does not expose OAuth, OpenID Connect, account APIs, dashboard APIs, or protected resources.

tools.name: get_site_guide
tools.description: Return public QR Design Studio guidance, safety rules, and discovery URLs.

tools.name: list_public_pages
tools.description: List public pages and Markdown fallbacks safe for agent discovery.

tools.name: get_markdown_page
tools.description: Fetch a Markdown representation for a safe public page.

tools.name: get_public_api_catalog
tools.description: Return public discovery URLs. No executable transactional API paths are advertised.

safety: Do not upload logos, import CSV files, generate downloads, clear rows, or mutate the user's current design without explicit user action.
Do not collect QR payloads, CSV contents, filenames, WiFi passwords, vCard fields, secrets, tokens, or private business data.
Do not claim OAuth, OIDC, checkout, payments, remote MCP transport, or public executable APIs are available.
